---
title: "Carlos Granell"
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/cgranell
        - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
          url: mailto:carlos.granell@uji.es
        - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID 0000-0003-1004-9695"
          url: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1004-9695
        - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
          url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=K9jGzhQAAAAJ
        - text: "{{< ai researcherid >}} RID A-A-4374-2008"
          url: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/A-4374-2008
        - text: "{{< ai osf >}} OSF"
          url: https://osf.io/6xkmu/
image: images/picture20150818.jpg
---

## Bio

Carlos Granell is associate professor at UJI. He previously held a 5-year Ramón y Cajal post-doctoral fellowship, worked for 3 years as a postdoc in the Digital Earth and Reference Data Unit of the European Commission’s Joint Research Centre (Italy), and was a post- and pre-doctoral researcher during the period 2003-2010 at the Universitat Jaume I of Castellón, from which he holds a Ph.D. (2006). His research interests lie in multi-disciplinary GIS,  spatial analysis & visualization applied to mental health and mobility, and reproducibility research practice in GIScience. Carlos is also member of the <a href="https://agile-gi.eu/">AGILE</a> Council. 

## Key research interests


## Teaching


## Selected papers


## Professional affiliations
